_meta.adr: ADR-037 modular manifest fragment — never edit src/manifest.json
_meta.description: People group landing dashboard (nav-restructure-dashboards, supersedes ADR-044 cards-collapse): GroupPeople is BOTH navigable (lands on the PeopleDashboard domain dashboard) AND collapsible (its four leaves render as nav sub-children — no longer in menu-layout.json#removals).
